bullets.text: US President Trump has arrived in China for high-stakes talks with Xi, with trade, Iran, and Taiwan on the agenda. Trump is expected to press China on opening its markets, while Beijing will likely address the status of Taiwan.
A court has overturned Alex Murdaugh's murder convictions and ordered a new trial for the June 2021 killings of Paul and Maggie Murdaugh.
The number of internal displacements caused by violence or conflict reached a record high in 2025, with 32.3 million people displaced, surpassing those caused by disasters for the first time.
Gun shop owners in South Australia are facing financial uncertainty due to a lack of clarity regarding the government's proposed firearm control reforms.
The company operating Canvas, an educational platform, has reportedly made a deal with hackers, a move cybersecurity experts warn could encourage future extortion attempts.
Donald Trump has arrived in Beijing for a high-stakes summit with Xi Jinping, where discussions are expected to cover trade, AI, and Taiwan, amidst looming concerns about a potential war with Iran.
The US sold 30-year bonds at a 5% yield, a rate not seen since 2007, following data indicating the sharpest rise in producer prices since the conflict in Ukraine began.
The Senate confirmed Warsh as the new Fed chair, concluding a contentious selection process for the central bank's leader.
US stocks reached new all-time highs, driven by a rally in technology companies, despite inflation data suggesting the Federal Reserve may maintain higher interest rates for longer.
